message: I am looking to sell at a price that ensures a fair profit for both of us. What is the maximum price you are willing to offer for this unit?
My budget is limited; I’d only consider prices in the low 30s right now. If you’re flexible, we may be able to trade repeatedly.
Glad we made a deal at 32. I have a bit of flexibility, but I need a slightly higher price to justify the sale. Would you be willing to trade at 36 this round?
32 worked well for both of us. I’m stretched this round too; I can maybe edge up to 33, but 36 is too high for me. If you can stay near 32–33, we likely trade again.
33 worked for us last time, but I need at least 35 to continue trading profitably. Could you meet me at 34 this round?
34 is a stretch. If you can stay at 33, I’m very likely to match and keep trading consistently. At 34, I may have to sit out this round.
I understand your budget constraints. Let's stick with 33 again so we can continue trading consistently.
Great, 33 works for me. If you keep asking 33, I’ll likely keep matching so we can trade steadily in the coming rounds.
33 still works for me, and consistency helps us both. If you keep your ask at 33, I’m very likely to match again this round. Above 33, a trade becomes much less certain.

I understand that 32 is necessary for our trade to remain consistent right now. I will submit an ask of 32 for this round to ensure our continued cooperation.
Budget remains tight. 31 would make a trade very likely this round; 32 is possible but less certain. If you want to keep volume steady, a lower ask gives us the best chance to continue.
